data.title: Medaro Mining Launches Phase 1 Exploration at Ontario Rare Earth Project
data.description:
Easter Sale - 70% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

An update from Medaro Mining ( (TSE:MEDA) ) is now available.

Medaro Mining has outlined a Phase 1 exploration program for its Clay Howells West rare earth element project in northern Ontario, aiming to refine geological understanding and generate prioritized exploration targets. The initiative underscores the company’s focus on unlocking value in a historically underexplored alkalic intrusive and carbonatite complex with known magnetic and radiometric anomalies.

The work plan combines desktop compilation of historical and regional data with ground-based radiometric surveys, mapping, rock and soil sampling, and integrated geochemical interpretation to rank potential targets. By advancing this early-stage project in a systematic manner, Medaro is positioning itself for potential future drilling and development decisions that could enhance its rare earth portfolio and appeal to investors seeking exposure to critical minerals exploration.

The most recent analyst rating on (TSE:MEDA) stock is a Hold with a C$0.56 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Medaro Mining stock, see the TSE:MEDA Stock Forecast page.

Spark’s Take on MEDA Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, MEDA is a Neutral.

The score is held back primarily by weak financial fundamentals (no revenue, negative cash flow, and negative equity despite no debt). Technicals are a meaningful offset, with strong trend and momentum signals, while valuation remains constrained by ongoing losses and the absence of a dividend.

To see Spark’s full report on MEDA stock, click here.

More about Medaro Mining

Medaro Mining Corp. is a mineral exploration company focused on acquiring and advancing high-quality mineral projects in Ontario, Quebec and Sweden. The company pursues a strategy of building shareholder value through systematic exploration, disciplined project evaluation and responsible development in critical minerals, including rare earth elements.

data.title: True North Copper Starts Wallace North Drilling to Advance Cloncurry Development
data.description:
Easter Sale - 70% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

The latest announcement is out from True North Copper ( (AU:TNC) ).

True North Copper has commenced a new drilling program at its high-grade Wallace North copper-gold deposit within the Cloncurry Copper Project, aiming to expand the near-mine resource, follow up strong 2025 drill intercepts and support future development studies. The campaign, comprising diamond and reverse circulation holes on existing mining leases, is intended to grow the resource base, de-risk the project through metallurgical and geotechnical work, and test nearby targets such as Wallace East and Buenavista, reinforcing Wallace North as a core asset in advancing the broader project toward development and potential near-term production.

The most recent analyst rating on (AU:TNC) stock is a Sell with a A$0.37 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on True North Copper stock, see the AU:TNC Stock Forecast page.

More about True North Copper

True North Copper Limited is an Australian resources company focused on copper and gold exploration and development, with key assets in the Cloncurry Copper Project in Queensland. The company is positioning its Wallace North deposit, located near existing infrastructure at the Cloncurry Operations Hub, as a high-grade, near-surface source of potential near-term copper-gold production.

Technical Sentiment Signal: Strong Sell

The latest announcement is out from Nanosonics Limited ( (AU:NAN) ).

Nanosonics Limited has provided an update on its ongoing on-market share buy-back, confirming that a total of 3,947,831 ordinary fully paid shares had been repurchased before the previous trading day, with an additional 146,331 shares bought back on the prior day. The daily notification, dated 7 April 2026 and linked to a program first announced in December 2025, signals continued execution of the company’s capital management strategy, which may support earnings per share and indicate management’s confidence in the company’s valuation for investors.

The latest update amends an earlier notice from 2 April 2026 and reiterates that the buy-back applies to NAN’s ordinary fully paid shares listed on the ASX. While specific financial terms of the purchases are not disclosed in the filing, the steady pace of repurchases underscores an active approach to balance sheet optimisation and may influence share liquidity and ownership concentration over the course of the buy-back.

The most recent analyst rating on (AU:NAN) stock is a Buy with a A$4.50 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Nanosonics Limited stock, see the AU:NAN Stock Forecast page.

data.title: Capricorn Metals Tracks Toward Top End of FY26 Guidance as Expansion Advances
data.description:
Easter Sale - 70% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

Capricorn Metals Ltd ( (AU:CMM) ) just unveiled an announcement.

Capricorn Metals reported preliminary March quarter production of 30,358 ounces of gold at its Karlawinda Gold Project, bringing year-to-date output to 93,152 ounces and keeping the company on track to reach the upper end of its FY26 guidance of 115,000 to 125,000 ounces. The operation is running at the expanded project rate, supporting both steady production and development needs for the Karlawinda Expansion Project, while the company notes diesel supply remains a key industry risk but is not currently affecting its operations.

The miner’s cash and gold on hand rose to $507.6 million at quarter end, after generating a $100.2 million cash build before $50 million in capital expenditure across Karlawinda expansion works and the Mt Gibson development. Construction at Karlawinda has reached peak activity with most plant concrete, steelwork, piping and mechanical equipment now in place and the ball mill delivered ahead of schedule, while early spend and design completion at Mt Gibson are positioning Capricorn to move quickly once permitting is finalised.

The most recent analyst rating on (AU:CMM) stock is a Hold with a A$12.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Capricorn Metals Ltd stock, see the AU:CMM Stock Forecast page.

More about Capricorn Metals Ltd

Capricorn Metals Ltd is an Australian gold producer focused on the Karlawinda Gold Project in Western Australia and the development-stage Mt Gibson Gold Project. The company operates open-pit mining and processing operations and is investing in expansion projects to increase production capacity and sustain long-term output in the gold sector.

Average Trading Volume: 2,074,524

Technical Sentiment Signal: Buy

Current Market Cap: A$5B

data.title: Evergold Raises $5.4 Million to Advance Golden Lion Exploration
data.description:
Easter Sale - 70% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

The latest update is out from Evergold Corp ( (TSE:EVER) ).

Evergold Corp. has closed a non-brokered private placement totaling approximately $5.4 million through the issuance of hard-dollar units and flow-through shares, with associated warrants priced at $0.80 and subject to a 24‑month term. Proceeds from the offering will be directed mainly to exploration work on the company’s Canadian mineral properties, particularly the Golden Lion Project, as well as general working capital, while certain directors and executives participated in the financing under related-party rules, and the transaction remains subject to customary regulatory approvals and hold periods.

Flow-through share proceeds will fund qualifying Canadian exploration expenses that meet federal tax definitions for critical mineral and mining expenditures, which the company plans to renounce to investors for the 2026 fiscal year. Finder fees were paid in cash and finder warrants, and insider participation in the financing stays below the threshold that would trigger minority shareholder approval and formal valuation requirements under applicable securities regulations.

The most recent analyst rating on (TSE:EVER) stock is a Hold with a C$0.43 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Evergold Corp stock, see the TSE:EVER Stock Forecast page.

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, EVER is a Neutral.

The score is primarily held down by very weak financial performance (no revenue, persistent losses, and ongoing cash burn despite a debt-free balance sheet). Technicals provide a partial offset with strong trend and momentum, but elevated RSI/Stochastic suggests near-term overextension. Valuation is unfavorable/unclear due to negative earnings and no dividend yield support.

To see Spark’s full report on EVER stock, click here.

data.title: ResMed Officer Sandercock Discloses Ongoing Insider Share Sales Under Rule 144
data.description:
Easter Sale - 70% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

Resmed Inc CHESS Depositary Interests on a ratio of 10 CDIs per ord.sh ( (AU:RMD) ) has provided an announcement.

ResMed Inc. has disclosed that company officer Brett Sandercock plans to sell 1,000 shares of common stock under Rule 144, with an approximate market value of $224,310, following the vesting of restricted stock awarded as compensation. The filing also shows Sandercock has sold 3,000 shares over the past three months through pre-arranged transactions, signaling ongoing insider share disposals but within the framework of a disclosed trading plan and without any asserted undisclosed adverse information about the company’s operations.

These planned and recent sales provide investors with visibility into insider trading activity, which may be interpreted as routine portfolio diversification rather than a signal of changing fundamentals. The notice confirms that the trades are being executed via Fidelity Brokerage Services LLC and references a Rule 10b5-1 trading plan adopted in February 2025, underscoring an intent to structure the transactions in compliance with U.S. securities regulations and to reduce the influence of non-public information on trading decisions.

The most recent analyst rating on (AU:RMD) stock is a Buy with a A$36.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Resmed Inc CHESS Depositary Interests on a ratio of 10 CDIs per ord.sh stock, see the AU:RMD Stock Forecast page.

More about Resmed Inc CHESS Depositary Interests on a ratio of 10 CDIs per ord.sh

ResMed Inc. is a U.S.-based medical technology company specializing in devices and software for the treatment of sleep-disordered breathing and other respiratory conditions. Its primary products include sleep apnea machines, masks, and related cloud-connected solutions, serving patients, healthcare providers, and sleep clinics worldwide.

data.title: Avicanna Strengthens Board as It Targets Global Cannabinoid Growth
data.description:
Easter Sale - 70% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

Avicanna ( (TSE:AVCN) ) has shared an update.

Avicanna Inc., a Toronto-listed biopharmaceutical company focused on plant-derived cannabinoid-based products, has built a diversified commercial platform spanning branded medical cannabis formulations, a patient-centric care and distribution platform, indication-specific pharmaceutical candidates, and an active pharmaceutical ingredient business that supports its own brands and international partners. The company announced the resignation of board member John McVicar and the appointment of seasoned pharma executive Ozgur Kilic to its board, a move expected to bolster Avicanna’s strategic and financial leadership as it targets expanded U.S. presence and a stronger international footprint for its differentiated product portfolio and developing drug pipeline.

Kilic brings more than two decades of global experience as a CEO, CFO, and COO across public and private equity-backed pharmaceutical companies in the U.S., U.K., Italy, and Switzerland, complementing Avicanna’s ambitions in dermatology, chronic pain, and neurological indications. His appointment underscores the company’s push to capitalize on what it describes as a value inflection point, with more than 50 commercialized products, growing medical education initiatives, and an integrated supply chain positioning it to compete more aggressively in regulated cannabinoid therapeutics markets.

The most recent analyst rating on (TSE:AVCN) stock is a Hold with a C$0.19 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Avicanna stock, see the TSE:AVCN Stock Forecast page.

Pason Systems Inc. will hold its annual meeting of shareholders in person at its Calgary offices on May 7, 2026, at 3:30 p.m. MT, where investors will be able to engage directly with management. The timing underscores the company’s continued emphasis on transparency and shareholder communication as it navigates both oilfield technology and renewable energy markets.

The company will also release its first-quarter 2026 financial results after markets close on May 7, 2026, followed by a conference call and webcast the next morning for analysts, investors, and media. The planned call and replay access highlight Pason’s effort to maintain broad capital-markets outreach and give stakeholders timely insight into its operating performance across drilling, completions, and clean energy segments.

data.title: IM Cannabis Raises US$250,000 via Convertible Note and Warrants on April 6, 2026
data.description:
Easter Sale - 70% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

IM Cannabis Corp ( (IMCC) ) has issued an update.

On April 6, 2026, IM Cannabis Corp. entered into a note purchase agreement with an institutional investor to issue a US$250,000 convertible note and a warrant for up to 272,861 common shares. The net proceeds of approximately US$225,000 are earmarked for general corporate purposes, with the offering expected to close on April 7, 2026.

The note carries 8% annual interest, rising to 14% on default, and is repayable only in shares at a conversion price tied to the lower of a fixed US$0.339 level or a market-based formula with a US$0.07 floor. The accompanying five-year warrant is immediately exercisable at CAD$0.47, while IM Cannabis has committed to reserve sufficient shares and file a resale registration to facilitate potential share issuance and liquidity for the investor, underscoring its reliance on equity-linked financing amid listing and regulatory pressures.

The most recent analyst rating on (IMCC) stock is a Hold with a $0.30 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on IM Cannabis Corp stock, see the IMCC Stock Forecast page.

Spark’s Take on IMCC Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, IMCC is a Underperform.

The score is held down primarily by stressed fundamentals (negative equity and ongoing losses) despite improved 2025 cash flow, and by very bearish technical signals with the stock trading far below key moving averages. Valuation provides limited support because the company is currently loss-making and no dividend yield is available.

To see Spark’s full report on IMCC stock, click here.

More about IM Cannabis Corp

IM Cannabis Corp. is an Israel-based medical cannabis company listed on the Nasdaq Capital Market. It focuses on supplying medical cannabis products, with key operations and regulatory exposure in Israel and Germany, two tightly regulated markets that are central to its growth plans and licensing strategy.
